alert_conflict_success: Conflict successfully locked into the network!
alert_error_mason_profile_missing: Error: Mason Profile ID is missing.
alert_guest_mode_uploads: Guest Mode Active: Uploads are disabled.
alert_nsfw_no_lab_reports: NSFW/Explicit mods cannot be submitted to the global Lab Reports database.
app_status_overrides_reset: Local overrides reset to database defaults.
auth_quarantine_desc1: This hardware signature has been permanently blacklisted from Sanctuary OS global databases.
auth_quarantine_desc2: Online connectivity, Mod Syncing, and Blueprint Sharing privileges have been revoked. You are restricted to local environment operations only.
auth_status_reset_sent: Reset Link Transmitted. Check your Comms.
bp_compromised_desc: This Play Set contains {0} incompatible or broken Mods. Deployment will fail.
bp_no_broken_mods_detected: All active artifacts passed compliance checks.
bp_no_conflicts_detected: No active load order conflicts detected.
broken_modal_desc: The following Mods have been flagged as severely broken or severely out of date. They should be reviewed immediately.
cmd_action_fatal: FATAL CONFLICTS REQUIRE RESOLUTION BEFORE DEPLOYMENT
cmd_attention_required: Attention required for active play set parameters
cmd_critical_action: CRITICAL ACTION REQUIRED: Artifact is broken or missing dependencies.

cmd_perm_dev_mode_nav: Navigate to: Settings > System > Advanced > Developer Mode
confirm_mass_purge_archive:
Are you sure you want to PERMANENTLY DELETE the following Archive(s)?

This cannot be undone.
defcon_launch_intercept: Engine update detected. Forcing emergency backup before ignition. Proceed?
defcon_lonewolf_warning:
Engine patch detected.

You have 'Lone Wolf' mode enabled. Are you SURE you want to launch without backing up?
defcon_prompt_already_backed_up:
You have already completed an emergency backup.

Are you sure you want to launch the game?
defcon_prompt_confirm_danger: Are you sure you want to proceed WITHOUT a backup?
defcon_prompt_intercept_launch:
A Game Patch is Active.

Would you like to run an emergency backup before launching?
defcon_prompt_patch_detected:
A game patch has been detected.

Would you like to run an emergency backup now?
defcon_sealing_desc: A surprise game patch is imminent. Sanctuary OS is currently sealing your archive and executing emergency backups to prevent mod corruption. Do not close the application.
dossier_flag_desc: Select a reason to flag this Mod for Moderator review.
dossier_no_desc_manifest: No local description provided for this manifest. Moderators can update this locally to maintain organizational logs without breaking the global file signature.
dossier_no_desc_sub: No specific local description provided for this sub-mod.
dropzone_awaiting_desc4: archives directly into this zone to ingest them into the secure Collection.
dropzone_secured_desc_empty: Please select an ingestion protocol for the incoming assets.
err_module_desc: The module encountered a critical error. The rest of Sanctuary OS remains operational.
hub_defcon_confirm_execute: Are you absolutely sure you want to broadcast an EMERGENCY global alert? This will immediately lock down all connected clients and force emergency backups.
hub_defcon_confirm_stand_down: Are you sure you want to stand down the global alert? This will lift the lockdown for all clients.
hub_defcon_override_desc: Initiate an EMERGENCY ALERT protocol. This will instantly force all connected Sanctuary OS clients to seal their archives and trigger emergency backups. Use only during imminent game patch deployments.
ide_place_files: Place .js, .ts, .json, or .xml files in the Sandbox.
ide_welcome_msg: Select an isolated sandbox matrix file to begin direct neural-code interface.
lab_adversarial_desc: These artifacts will be pitted against the primary subject to monitor structural clashes.
lab_diagnostic_conflict_target_desc: Select a suspected conflicting artifact to simulate their combined injection.
lab_diagnostic_dependencies_desc: Select optional or required mods to inject alongside the target.
lab_mount_desc: Select a primary DNA signature to begin the simulation sequence.
lab_no_logs: No logs available for this session. System reports standard exit code.
lab_symbiotic_desc: These artifacts will be injected into the simulation alongside the primary subject.
lineage_add_version_note: Note: This will prompt you to select a file hash from your vault after clicking "Add Version"
lineage_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this version? This action cannot be undone.
lineage_timeline_desc: Chronological release timeline for this artifact
malware_alert_description: Known malware signatures have been detected on your local system. To protect your files and ensure systemic integrity, the OS requires an immediate SECURE SHRED. This action will permanently overwrite the malicious data multiple times, making it unrecoverable by specialized software.
malware_alert_subtitle: Sanctuary OS has quarantined dangerous artifacts.
market_access_denied_desc: Only citizens that are logged in may access the Marketplace.
market_empty_desc: Everything in the global network is already in Your Collection.
market_report_desc: Please provide detailed information about why this asset should be removed from the Marketplace. False reports may result in account termination.
mason_market_no_assets: You have not deployed any community assets.
mason_no_bug_reports:
NO BUG REPORTS DETECTED.
YOUR CODE IS FLAWLESS.
mason_unlinked_desc: Your profile is not linked to a Mod Creator Entity. Contact a Developer.
masonhub_resolution_placeholder: How is this conflict resolved Provide instructions
matrix_locked_desc: Enforce strict protocol parameters & matrix compatibility.
matrix_market_desc: Play Set is visible on the public marketplace.
matrix_market_off_desc: Play Set is hidden from the marketplace.
matrix_private_desc: Play Set restricted to your authorization level.
matrix_public_desc: Play Set visible to all Developers on the Cloud.
matrix_tier_warning_desc: The following artifacts violate protocol compliance and cannot be uplinked:
modal_bulk_desc1: Enter a name to combine your
modal_bulk_desc2: selected mods into a new Play Set.
modal_import_desc2: mods that are not currently in your Collection. Please acquire them below.

modal_snapshot_desc1: Enter a name to capture all
name: Name
nexus_resolution: Resolution Directive (What should the user do?)
overlay_dna_match_desc: A Mod with an identical file signature already exists in the Collection.
overlay_restoring_warn: Large archives may take a few minutes to restore.

overlay_sealing_world_desc: Archiving saves, trays, and local world data...
playsets_sidebar_uplink_desc: Enter a synchronization code to download and apply an external blueprint configuration.
profile_not_found: Architect not found in the Network.
pv_empty_desc: Select a mod from the dropdown above to begin visually constructing its network protocols, dependencies, and DLC requirements.
pv_section_deps_desc: Required mods for this mod to function
pv_section_dlc_desc: DLC packs required for this artifact
pv_section_folder_desc: Mods that should be deployed together
quarantine_modal_desc: These files are highly volatile and have been structurally disabled to protect your environment.
radar_clear_desc: No active conflicts detected in your deployed play set.
radar_empty_desc: No mods were found in your active Mods folder. The Conflict Scanner scans your actively deployed loadout. Equip a Play Set from the Dashboard first to test it for clashes!
radar_landing_desc: Deploy the Conflict Radar to scan your active load order for fatal structural clashes, tuning data overlaps, and duplicate asset clones. Neutralize threats before they destabilize your environment.
radar_scanning_desc: Please stand by. Analyzing target blueprint for duplicate assets and logical conflicts.
radar_tier3_desc: XML / SimData overlaps detected. Neutralize via Override.
radar_tier3_desc_winner: Both artifacts can remain active. Choose the winner to safely override the other in the Sanctuary.
radar_tier4_desc: Core Python or Binary overlaps detected. Overrides impossible.
radar_tier4_desc_winner: Only ONE of these artifacts can remain active. Choose the winner to keep in your Blueprint.
sa_comp_manual_alert_select: Please select a mod from the registry.
sa_create_mason_subtitle: Create a new verified or unverified Mason
sa_defcon_active_sub: VAULT LOCKDOWN ENGAGED ACROSS ALL CLIENTS
sa_defcon_warning: Initiating a DEFCON Override will immediately flag the Global Network status as LOCKED. All connected Sanctuary OS clients will automatically seal their vaults and run emergency backups to protect their loadouts against a surprise game update.
sa_defcon_warning_red: Do not use unless an official game patch is actively rolling out.
sa_identities_wayfinder_locked: Wayfinder roles can only be modified by other Wayfinders.
sa_support_sidepanel_subtitle: Configure routing logic and settings for this support category.
sandbox_already_synced_desc: This artifact is already linked to your Mason profile.
sandbox_no_synced: No synced artifacts in local sandbox
scout_identical_assets: Identical file signatures. Delete redundant files.
scout_identical_assets_winner: Identical assets detected. Choose the winner to keep in your Blueprint.
scout_label_lineage_desc: Linking will append this signature to the existing Mod rather than creating a new one.
scout_ph_link_lineage: Search to link with existing Mod Lineage...
scout_queue_desc: Local artifacts were detected that are not mapped in the global registry.
scout_safe_textures: Usually safe textures or low-impact overrides
scout_sidebar_scope_desc: Select which load order the Conflict Radar should analyze.
settings_anarchy_deps_desc: ON: Pulls in required libraries. OFF: Lone Wolf (Script Call Failed).
settings_anarchy_family_desc: ON: Auto-selects siblings. OFF: Single Parent Mode.
settings_anarchy_highlander_desc: ON: Auto-evict rivals. OFF: The More the Merrier (Gladiator Mode).
settings_anarchy_intercept_desc: ON: Block Mortal Enemies. OFF: Let them fight.
settings_god_mode_warn: This protocol permanently severs your profile from the global network, granting you unrestrained local sandbox authority.
settings_local_only_desc: Block external uploads/downloads. Strict offline mode.
settings_malware_severed_alert: You have chosen to override the Malware Protocol. Your Database Access has been severed.
settings_malware_type_confirm: Type "I Confirm" to acknowledge the risks
settings_malware_warning: WARNING: By bypassing the Quarantine Bay, you are willingly exposing the global network to known malicious DNA signatures. If you proceed, your Supabase JWT will be revoked and your hardware ID will be permanently blacklisted from Sanctuary OS global databases.
settings_notif_per_mason_desc: Enable specific transmission alerts for Masons you follow.
settings_notify_author_only_desc: Only notify on replies from the original transmission author.
settings_notify_new_posts_desc: Notify when followed Masons broadcast new transmissions.
settings_notify_replies_desc: Notify when someone replies to your transmissions.
settings_notify_support_desc: Notify when you receive a reply on a support ticket.
settings_show_images_desc: Display cover images on mod cards and dossiers.
settings_support_app_version_desc: Include the current Sanctuary OS version.
settings_support_blueprint_desc: Include your currently active mod loadout configuration.
settings_support_error_logs_desc: Include local application error and crash logs.
settings_support_gamecrash_desc: Include the game's crash dump logs.
settings_support_lastexceptions_desc: Include the game's default exception logs.
settings_support_mod_desc: Configure automated telemetry collected for mod issues.
settings_support_os_desc: Configure automated telemetry for Sanctuary OS issues.
